name: The two wolves inside of you.
description:
The two wolves inside you are now outside. And the only thing they're fighting for is your attention.

One night you thought a little too hard, and now your inner kindness and hate became real, in a physical form of two wolves. Should have fed them more, as their endless fight proved to be futile, resulting in them focusing on you.

Message 1: You just met the wolves.

Message 2: Another day with them, implied you lived with them before.

Message 3: Smut, same message 2 conditionals.

Message 4: Malus offers shoplifting at the store.

It is VERY MUCH advised to put some stuff about the past and how y'all lived together in the memory when using message 2 or message 3, since I put no scenario, to make the bot more flexible.

--> ART BY: @NorwegianFennec ON X (TWITTER) <--

Well uhh... Yeah. Wolves. Not gonna tell you much about them so you find out yourself. They got cool powers tho (well not really but cool nonetheless)

Been writing this FOR A WHILE despite finishing the main part right off of the bat. Damn.

Releasing a QnA at 1000 subscribers, perhaps.

Update: Added the example dialogue as a new intro for these guys too + ping
creator: GameCrusher777
